head: current_direct_bbox
hypothesis: E-29: DIoU + center=0.0 + T=7 + 8ep probe. Best loss (DIoU only, 0.2893 from E-28) × best architecture (T=7, +0.020 from E-22 vs E-18). E-28 (DIoU) and E-22 (T=7) improve through different mechanisms — DIoU via better center/IoU gradient, T=7 via richer temporal signal for motion-based camouflage disambiguation. These should be additive. If mIoU > 0.308, superposition confirmed → promote to 30ep. If < 0.290, the gains are non-additive (diminishing returns). 8ep probe with canonical train_batch=16. eval_batch=64 for speed.
